pr_text:
## Title: Fix signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatches in nFAPI VNF P7

### Summary
The nFAPI VNF P7 subsystem contains signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatches that generate compiler warnings and risk incorrect branching behavior. The `in_sync` field in `nfapi_vnf_p7_connection_info_t` is an unsigned integer type, but multiple functions compare it against signed literals (0 and 1). Additionally, frame/slot number fields (`sfn_sf`, `sfn`, `slot`) in the connection info struct are decla
